name: Awesome MCP Servers
summary: The largest community index of Model Context Protocol servers.
install: Browse the index and install MCP servers manually or through your client.
why_it_matters: MCP discovery is one of the clearest star-proven demand centers in agentic development.
caveats: Large lists need extra vetting before installing third-party servers.

name: Context7
summary: Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors.
install: Use Context7 MCP integration or supported editor/client setup.
why_it_matters: Fresh library docs are a universal pain point for coding agents.
caveats: Coverage and freshness vary by library.

name: Claude Mem
summary: Persistent context across sessions for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and more.
install: Follow the upstream installation guide for your coding agent.
why_it_matters: Memory is the strongest current developer demand signal in AI coding-agent workflows.
caveats: Memory systems can inject stale or low-quality context if not maintained.

name: Get Shit Done
summary: Meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for Claude Code.
install: Use the upstream setup instructions and adapt to your agent client.
why_it_matters: Spec-driven agent workflows have huge adoption momentum.
caveats: Opinionated workflows may need pruning for smaller projects.

name: Awesome Claude Code
summary: Curated skills, hooks, commands, orchestrators, applications, and plugins for Claude Code.
install: Browse categories and install tools from their upstream repositories.
why_it_matters: A high-star ecosystem map proves demand for agentic coding entry points.
caveats: Claude-specific; not every item transfers cleanly to Codex or Cursor.

name: Claude HUD
summary: Statusline plugin showing context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress.
install: Install as a Claude Code plugin following upstream instructions.
why_it_matters: Developers want live visibility into agent behavior and context usage.
caveats: Claude Code focused; use adjacent tools for other clients.

name: Awesome Claude Code Subagents
summary: Collection of specialized Claude Code subagents across development use cases.
install: Copy selected subagents into your Claude Code setup.
why_it_matters: Role-specific agent packs are a proven viral format.
caveats: Quality varies; install only roles you actually use.

name: Context Engineering Intro
summary: Practical introduction to making AI coding assistants work through better context engineering.
install: Read and adapt the patterns into your project instructions.
why_it_matters: Context engineering has become a mainstream developer concern.
caveats: Educational material, not a drop-in runtime.

name: Claude Context
summary: Code search MCP for Claude Code that makes entire codebases available as agent context.
install: Install the MCP server and connect it to Claude Code.
why_it_matters: Codebase search remains a central bottleneck for agentic coding.
caveats: MCP setup and indexing costs depend on project size.

name: Awesome Codex Skills
summary: Curated practical Codex skills for automating workflows across Codex CLI and API.
install: Browse skill folders and install selected skills into your Codex setup.
why_it_matters: Codex skills are near the 10k-star threshold and still early.
caveats: Skill quality and maintenance differ by contributor.

name: InsForge
summary: Open-source backend platform for agentic coding: database, auth, storage, compute, hosting, and AI gateway.
install: Use upstream quickstart for local or hosted backend setup.
why_it_matters: Agentic coding increasingly needs shippable infrastructure, not just prompts.
caveats: Heavier than a prompt or skill; evaluate stack fit first.

name: Awesome Codex Subagents
summary: Collection of specialized Codex subagents for development tasks.
install: Copy selected subagent definitions into your Codex setup.
why_it_matters: Codex-native role packs are gaining fast ecosystem traction.
caveats: Avoid installing broad role packs without clear task boundaries.

name: Container Use
summary: Development environments for coding agents so multiple agents can work safely and independently.
install: Follow upstream setup to run agent work in isolated environments.
why_it_matters: Safe parallel agent work is becoming a real workflow need.
caveats: Requires comfort with containers and local dev environment setup.

name: Continuous Claude v3
summary: Context management for Claude Code with ledgers, handoffs, MCP execution, and isolated agent orchestration.
install: Follow the upstream Claude Code setup.
why_it_matters: Handoffs and isolated context are central to long-running agent work.
caveats: Claude Code oriented and opinionated.

name: Microsoft Skills
summary: Skills, MCP servers, custom agents, and AGENTS.md for grounding coding agents.
install: Browse official skill and MCP examples.
why_it_matters: Large vendors are converging around reusable agent capabilities.
caveats: Broad reference repo; not all examples are plug-and-play.

name: Claude Code Tools
summary: Practical productivity tools for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and similar coding agents.
install: Install selected tools from upstream instructions.
why_it_matters: Cross-agent productivity tooling is more durable than one-client hacks.
caveats: Tool coverage varies by client.

name: Claude Memory Compiler
summary: Hooks and compiler that organize Claude Code sessions into structured knowledge articles.
install: Follow upstream hook and compiler setup.
why_it_matters: Structured memory is emerging as the next layer after raw session capture.
caveats: Requires maintenance of generated knowledge quality.

name: Codex Skill Manager
summary: macOS app for managing Codex skills.
install: Install the macOS app from upstream releases or instructions.
why_it_matters: Skill management is a real friction point as Codex skills proliferate.
caveats: macOS focused.

name: Keep Codex Fast
summary: Backup-first Codex skill for keeping local Codex state fast, clean, and recoverable.
install: Install as a Codex skill following upstream instructions.
why_it_matters: Local agent state management becomes painful as usage grows.
caveats: Run cleanup tools carefully and keep backups.

name: Agentic Radar
summary: Security scanner for LLM agentic workflows.
install: Use upstream scanner setup for your workflow.
why_it_matters: Agent security is rising, even if not every developer prioritizes it yet.
caveats: Scanner findings need human review.

name: Coding Agent Session Search
summary: Unified TUI and CLI to index and search local coding-agent session history across many providers.
install: Install the TUI/CLI from upstream instructions.
why_it_matters: Session history becomes valuable once agents do meaningful work.
caveats: Read-only search is useful but not a full memory system.

name: Awesome AI Coding Tools
summary: Curated list of AI-powered coding tools.
install: Browse and compare tools from the list.
why_it_matters: Tool discovery has broad developer pull outside any single client.
caveats: General list; not optimized for stack recommendations.
